content.en:
"There is no problem with the identity of this reincarnation celestial clan copy body now, but its strength is still too weak, and it must be improved!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The Reincarnation Celestial Clan needs to complete the bloodline awakening before they can break through to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

The normal reincarnation of the Heavenly Clan naturally completes the bloodline awakening after adulthood, but Ao Chen cannot.

"If you take the path of bloodline awakening, the growth rate of this copy body is too slow, it is better to cultivate the body of reincarnation Haotian first, and then take the fourth path, so that the strength can grow quickly!" Ye Tian decided.

Of course.

This fourth path and the first three paths are extremely difficult and not suitable for other reincarnation celestials.

Those reincarnation celestial clans can easily cultivate to the level of more than four awakenings in the future, and there is no difficulty, just spend some more time, let them find these paths, they are not happy, and they can't look down on it.

After all, these paths are all imitations of them, how can it be possible to be willing to fall to follow these paths.

It is also the reincarnation of Haotian's body method that is the supreme other shore origin ancestral body method, which is worthy of Ye Tian's use on Ao Chen's copy body.

Cultivating the body of reincarnation Haotian requires resources, and it is not difficult for Ye Tian to get his hands on it.

In Fengyu City alone, there are shops that sell resources, and coupled with his identity, it is not difficult for even the most wasted reincarnation celestial clan to get resources.

So, not long after, Ye Tian gathered all the resources and began to cultivate the Reincarnation Haotian Body Method.

Soon.

Ye Tian successfully made Ao Chen's body copy and practiced into the body of reincarnation Haotian, and then refined the three-source secret medicine, and began to impact the first balance.

Once the breakthrough is successful, his strength will definitely be comparable to the reincarnation celestial clan that has awakened four times.

The years passed.

Ye Tian knew a lot about the reincarnation of Haotian's body method, and the direct impact was successful.

Rumble!!!!!!

Countless energies poured in from all around, helping Ye Tian's replica body to complete its body transformation.

At this time, the reincarnation Heavenly Ancestor bloodline was activated, and the bloodline also began to awaken, combining with the body of the reincarnation Haotian to become a more powerful bloodline.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed that an extremely powerful power had been awakened, this power came from the depths of the bloodline, and it seemed to have something to do with the power that existed in the Origin Ancestor, and it was the power that surpassed the nine awakenings.

In a flash.

A spear of reincarnation appeared in Ye Tian's mind, it was just an illusory shadow, but it seemed to be able to crush the eons and shatter the endless reincarnation.

At the same time, a stream of information was integrated from the bloodline of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan into Ye Tian's Origin Realm will.

Soon, he understood what was going on.

Reincarnation Supreme Divine Power - Spear of the Ruins!

Through the bloodline inheritance knowledge, it can be known that this kind of reincarnation supreme divine power is an extremely rare existence of the reincarnation celestial clan, and it is difficult to awaken, and the spear of the ruin sky is a terrifying technique that surpasses the supreme art on the other side.

Although Ye Tian has now awakened the supreme power of reincarnation of the Spear of the Ruin Heaven, he is only casting a blow now, and after one blow, he has to exhaust most of his strength, and he has no fighting strength.

"I didn't expect that there would be a reincarnation supreme divine power beyond the supreme technique on the other side!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

If he hadn't come here, he wouldn't have wanted to know at all, he might have cultivated to the ninth balance, and it would be difficult for him to know the inheritance of the supreme divine power of reincarnation.

However, this is the bloodline reincarnation supreme supernatural power, and only this Ao Chen's copy body can be cast, and the real body copy body cannot be cast, unless he can create a reincarnation supreme supernatural power.

"The reincarnation supreme divine power is too advanced, it takes too many years to create it, let's create it slowly in the future!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Another time passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already stabilized the realm of the first balance, in terms of realm, it was only equivalent to an ordinary awakening reincarnation celestial clan, but the actual combat strength was comparable to the four awakening reincarnation celestial clans.

If you use the supreme power of reincarnation, you may be able to severely damage the five awakening reincarnation celestial clans.

Of course.

He must be comparing the general reincarnation celestial clan, maybe there are also demons like him who can fight beyond the level in the reincarnation celestial clan, so there is no way to compare.

"The balance is still too weak for the first time, you have to improve your strength as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian thought about whether to take the reincarnation true liquid from the replica body of the land of eternity and use it for Ao Chen's replica body, but after thinking about it carefully, it was not worth it, the reincarnation true liquid was too precious, it must be used for his own body!

Therefore, this replica body should find its own resources to improve its strength!

......

Fengyu City.

Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion.

This is a place where a group of reincarnation celestials gamble.

They would have many of their slaves fight here for fun, and occasionally the reincarnation of the Celestials would come to an end, but this was relatively rare and rare.

After all, the reincarnation celestial clan is also a good face, and if it is defeated by a slave of the same level, it will not look good on the face.

Moreover, it is also a shame to fight with slaves!

But occasionally, there will be reincarnation celestials who have fallen into a bottleneck but cannot break through, come here to fight, seeking a breakthrough, as long as they break through, no one will dare to mock.

Ye Tian is going to come here to earn some reincarnation heavenly coins, reincarnation heavenly coins are the currency of the reincarnation heavenly clan, which is very valuable and can buy a lot of resource treasures.

Aochen is a waste and doesn't have many resources on him, and he spent a lot of money to buy resources before.

Now, if he wants to improve his strength quickly, he must earn a large amount of reincarnation coins, and gambling by himself is the best and fastest way to accumulate wealth.

At this time.

Ye Tian came to the front desk of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion to sign up for the competition, which directly made the female red skeleton giant who had registered at the front desk tremble.

"My lord, do you really want to sign up?"

The female Crimson Giant asked.

"Yes, sign me up immediately!" Ye Tian said coldly.

This female red skeleton giant didn't dare to slack off, and immediately signed up for Ye Tian, and passed the news to the high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion, after all, this is not a trivial matter, and it needs to be approved by the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion.

Moreover, in the process of participating in the competition, you have to ensure the safety of the reincarnation celestial clan, and if you really lose, you have to save your life.

......

The depths of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion.

The main and deputy pavilion masters of the Reincarnation Heavenly Pavilion received the news.

"There's a clan member who wants to compete. The Pavilion Master of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, Xuduo, said with a smile.

"Which clansman is it?" the deputy pavilion master, Cha Bai, was curious.

"Aochen!" said Xuduo.

"Haven't heard of it. Cha Bai shook his head.

Although the number of reincarnation celestial clans is not large, there are also a lot, Ao Chen is too wasteful and marginalized, so they naturally haven't heard of it.

Xuduo said: "It is a clansman who has only completed one bloodline awakening, and he may need to break through to the second bloodline awakening, so he came here to fight and seek a breakthrough." Arrange for him to be in an awakened battle, and by the way, pay attention to safety, but don't have the death of the reincarnation celestials. "
